# agents/ (auto-generated, do not hand-edit)

These agent definitions are generated by Playwright. Create or refresh them with:

```bash
npx playwright init-agents --loop=claude     # for Claude Code
npx playwright init-agents --loop=vscode      # for VS Code / Copilot
npx playwright init-agents --loop=opencode    # for OpenCode
```

This writes the planner, generator, and healer definitions here. Each is a set
of instructions plus the Playwright MCP tools the agent is allowed to use. Treat
them as build output: regenerate rather than edit by hand, so an upgrade does not
clobber local tweaks.
